title: How to Build 24?7 Claude Agents. Easy.

extracted.hook: CloudCode has finally brought us routines, which basically means you can inject a prompt into CloudCode, but it can be running on the web.
transitions: What I tried to do is I did another one, which I wanted it to be able to use the YouTube Data API in order to grab some YouTube comments for me and give me a little analysis in, you know, ClickUp or whatever.
Now, the other thing to be aware of is you do have limits.
extracted.cta: "if you enjoyed the video or you learned something new, please give it a like. It helps me out a ton."
analogies: "think of it like you basically typing in a prompt, and then someone coming in to your laptop and typing it in for you. So, it's the exact same type of interaction as you talking to CloudCode."
extracted.vulnerability: "I've already been playing around with it. I've been migrating my automations over there."

accelerate: discussing the benefits of routines and their comparison to existing features
